_comment: Central mock data for the AI Procurement (Collatio) app. Edit any value here to change the mocked OCR extraction and the three-way-match tolerances. When the real Collatio API is ready, replace _mock_extraction() in doctype/collatio_validation/collatio_validation.py — the rest of the engine reads from this file.

extraction._anomaly_note: Set either 'enabled' below to true to DEMO validation on a single step (qty-mismatch detection / unknown-item resolution). Keep both false for a clean end-to-end chain — an injected over-qty would over-receive against the PO, and a repeated extra item would compound down the chain.
